scripts.render: remotion render src/index.ts typer-demo-dark ../public/demo/typer-demo-dark.mp4 --codec h264 && remotion render src/index.ts typer-demo-light ../public/demo/typer-demo-light.mp4 --codec h264
scripts.posters: remotion still src/index.ts typer-demo-dark ../public/demo/poster-dark.png --frame 150 && remotion still src/index.ts typer-demo-light ../public/demo/poster-light.png --frame 150
